name: Smart Contracts
description: On-chain parametric insurance protocol deployed on Avalanche Fuji

dbTables.name: ClaimZeroFactory (SurelyFactory)
dbTables.description: Factory that deploys InsurancePool instances. createPool() deploys a new pool; activatePool() transitions it from FUNDING to ACTIVE. Maintains a registry of all pool addresses. Address: 0x327f771EE67BeD16C7d8C3646c996e09d0e7566e

dbTables.name: InsurancePool
dbTables.description: Each pool is a separate contract deployed by SurelyFactory. Manages pool state (FUNDING→ACTIVE→SETTLED/EXPIRED), holds underwriting capital in CZUSD, mints PolicyNFTs on purchasePolicy(), settles payouts via CRERouter reports. Address: deployed per pool by factory

dbTables.name: PolicyNFT
dbTables.description: ERC-721 NFT representing an insurance policy. Each token holds the full policy state. Address: 0xC6D66927f90D072676792EEa0CBbEcA717419f1A

columns.name: payoutAmount
columns.type: uint256 — CZUSD paid out (0 if not settled)

dbTables.name: CZUSD
dbTables.description: ERC-20 stablecoin used for premiums and payouts. 1 CZUSD = 1 USD. Minted by CZUSDConsumer after Stripe payments. Address: 0xA8D24aDd4E9CE85e6875251a4a0a796BAa2acfCF

dbTables.name: CZUSDConsumer
dbTables.description: Chainlink consumer that mints CZUSD to user wallets after off-chain payment verification. Called by CRE payment-fiat workflow or server wallet after Stripe webhook. Address: 0xE6D1361B28713eE61d09D0a574F3Dcc7A49aA6F3

dbTables.name: CRERouter
dbTables.description: On-chain entry point for CRE workflow results. Receives trigger data from Chainlink CRE workflows and forwards settlement/expiry reports to InsurancePool.onReport(). Address: 0xB875b7132aE48fe7b3029C2b74D3E42A5A6A68b4

columns.name: authorizedWorkflow
columns.type: address — CRE workflow allowed to report

dbTables.name: EligibilityRegistry
dbTables.description: Registry of eligibility proofs. storeProof() called by server wallet after eligibility verification. getProof() read by InsurancePool during purchasePolicy(). Address: 0x2AC06eA51ae0C56ff2d74441206E081EECAE83fF

columns.name: proofHash
columns.type: bytes32 — SHA-256 of { walletAddress, verificationType, formData }

dbTables.name: ComplianceConsumer
dbTables.description: Chainlink consumer for compliance/KYC checks. Used by eligibility-kyc CRE workflow to write compliance results on-chain. Address: 0xF9190C124b9f34d97c5153517FF5c6BD654e0f01

dbTables.name: PolicyEngine (ACE)
dbTables.description: Autonomous Compliance Engine — pluggable policy framework. Maps function selectors to extractor + policy chains. Owner attaches IPolicy implementations and an IExtractor per selector. All attached policies must pass (all-or-nothing) before a restricted function executes. Address: 0xcF6031722B1F571E3553F9475AFB370CA6c4af7c

columns.name: policies
columns.type: address[] — ordered list of IPolicy contracts

dbTables.name: UnifiedExtractor (ACE)
dbTables.description: IExtractor implementation that decodes CZUSDConsumer.onReport(bytes) calldata into structured parameters for downstream policy evaluation. Status: implemented (undeployed — composed with PolicyEngine at runtime).

columns.name: selector
columns.type: bytes4 — function selector this extractor handles

columns.name: decodedParams
columns.type: bytes — ABI-decoded calldata for policy evaluation

dbTables.name: CoolingOffPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that enforces a cooling-off period (default 14 days) between policy purchases. Prevents immediate re-entry after a settlement event. Status: implemented.

dbTables.name: EligibilityPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that gates purchasePolicy() on having a valid proof in EligibilityRegistry. Reads getProof(user, verificationType) — rejects if proof is zero bytes32. Status: implemented.

dbTables.name: KYCPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that maintains an owner-controlled allowlist of KYC-verified addresses. Rejects callers not in credentials mapping. Status: implemented.

dbTables.name: PremiumVolumePolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that caps total premium volume a single address can accumulate. Prevents whale concentration risk in a pool. Status: implemented.

dbTables.name: SanctionsPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that maintains an owner-controlled sanctions blocklist. Rejects callers on the sanctions list. Status: implemented.

dbTables.name: SolvencyPolicy (ACE)
dbTables.description: IPolicy that enforces a minimum solvency ratio (default 120% = 12000 bps) — total underwritten capital must remain above the threshold relative to total coverage obligations. Status: implemented.

columns.name: solvencyRatioBps
columns.type: uint256 — min ratio in basis points (default 12000 = 120%)

columns.name: totalCoverageObligations
columns.type: uint256 — sum of all maxPayout * currentHolders
